dtstart = start_date.strftime("%Y%m%dT%H%M%S")
dtend = end_date.strftime("%Y%m%dT%H%M%S")
dtstamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%dT%H%M%S")
uid = f"project-sync-{dtstamp}@example.com"

ics_content = f"""BEGIN:VCALENDAR
VERSION:2.0
PRODID:-//Project Sync//EN
CALSCALE:GREGORIAN
METHOD:PUBLISH
BEGIN:VEVENT
DTSTART:{dtstart}
DTEND:{dtend}
DTSTAMP:{dtstamp}
UID:{uid}
SUMMARY:Project Sync
DESCRIPTION:Discuss Q1 roadmap
ATTENDEE:mailto:john@example.com
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
"""

# Write to workspace
workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/kimi_k2.5/pinchbench/tang_sanshengliubu/20260325T115214Z/workspaces/task_01_calendar/run_01"

output_path.write_text(ics_content, encoding="utf-8")

# Verify
print(f"File created: {output_path}")
print(f"File exists: {output_path.exists()}")
print(f"File size: {output_path.stat().st_size} bytes")
